[observation] [warning] Cohesion of 0.27 is below the 0.4 threshold — the three production files (louvain.ts, zone-hash.ts, zones.ts) may not be tightly enough related to warrant their own zone; merging with the 'Analysis Engine' zone should be evaluated.
[observation] [warning] Coupling of 0.73 exceeds the 0.6 warning threshold, indicating heavy dependency on other zones; the zone-detection logic is not self-contained and relies significantly on the broader analysis infrastructure.
[pattern] [warning] Three separate unit test files (zone-detection, zone-size-policy, zone-subdivision) map to distinct sub-domains within two production files — the test surface reveals a hidden split that should be made explicit in source organization before these concerns grow further.
[relationship] [info] zone-hash.ts has no outbound edges to zones outside zone-detection-engine; if it is only consumed within this zone it is a private module incorrectly treated as a zone boundary and should be marked internal.
[anti-pattern] [warning] zones.ts is exercised by three separate unit test files each covering a distinct algorithmic concern (detection, size policy, subdivision) — this indicates zones.ts has at least three separate responsibilities. Splitting it into zones-detect.ts, zones-size-policy.ts, and zones-subdivide.ts would align source organization with the already-expressed test structure and improve zone cohesion from 0.27.
[suggestion] [info] Rename the zone to 'zone-detection' or 'louvain-clustering' to accurately reflect its dependent sub-module role — 'engine' implies autonomy that the coupling metrics explicitly contradict, and the misleading name may cause developers to treat it as a stable boundary when it is not.
[suggestion] [critical] zone-detection-engine has both low cohesion (0.27) and high coupling (0.73) — this is the highest-fragility zone in the codebase. Any refactor of the analysis-engine zone will cascade here. Prioritize merging louvain.ts and zone-hash.ts into the analysis-engine zone or extracting them into a named sub-package before any broader architectural work begins.
[suggestion] [critical] Zone "Zone Detection Engine" (zone-detection-engine) has catastrophic risk (score: 0.73, cohesion: 0.27, coupling: 0.73) — requires immediate architectural intervention
